questionHtml: Hence determine whether the events in parts (d)(i) and (d)(ii) are independent. Justify your reasoning.
markschemeHtml:
they are not independent     (A1)(ft)

58100×45100≠17100  OR  0.261≠0.17     (R1)


Note: Comparison of numerical values must be seen for (R1) to be awarded.
Do not award (A1)(R0). Follow through from parts (d)(i) and (d)(ii).


[2 marks]
